# Repository Standards Intake

Before implementing any task in this repository:

1. Read `README.md`.
2. Read `docs/README.md`.
3. Read `docs/guidelines/framework-overview.md`.
4. Read relevant standards in `docs/guidelines/`:
   - `code-style.md`
   - `documentation.md`
   - `testing.md` (when tests are affected)

Use the `docs/` folder as source of truth for coding conventions, architecture guidance, and documentation standards.

If guidance conflicts, follow the most specific guidance for the files being changed, then align with `.github/copilot-instructions.md`.
